import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_exact_capacity():
    # Bug: weight < j should be weight <= j
    # When an item exactly fills the remaining capacity, it should be included
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    # Optimal: take the (3, 10) item which exactly fills capacity
    assert knapsack(capacity, items) == 10
